channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Ethereum is still a good long-term buy, according data: Analyst
item.description: Ethereum’s dominance in DeFi, stablecoins and staking is strengthening the long-term ETH accumulation thesis, despite it’s 28% price decline in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Bitcoin 'Pizza Day' was 16 years ago, here's how much that BTC is worth today
item.description: Laszlo Hanyecz's 2010 post, offering 10,000 BTC in exchange for two pizzas delivered to his home, marked the first recorded commercial BTC payment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair, as traders forecast rate hikes in 2026
item.description: US President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he wants the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, but investors forecast no chance of a rate cut in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
item.description: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
item.description: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
item.description: Institutional crypto adoption accelerates as Tether expands Bitcoin holdings, miners pivot to AI and Polymarket joins Nasdaq amid $1 billion fund outflows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $77K as Dow Jones hits new all-time highs
item.description: Bitcoin headed lower as Wall Street trading began with new record highs for the Dow Jones, while traders warned of weak US demand.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
item.description: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
item.description: MARA spent $4.3 million on CEO Fred Thiel’s security in 2025, including vehicle armoring, as crypto wrench attacks increased globally.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Space X IPO: 'Bad news' for tech stocks but what about Bitcoin?
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO could turn the Mag 7 into a Mag 8, with Tesla and SpaceX comprising 25% of the group's Bitcoin balance-sheet exposure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence as risks outpace yields
item.description: Repeated bridge exploits and shrinking yields are making institutions question whether DeFi’s risks still justify the returns, says Symbiotic’s Putiatin.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yohan Yun

item.title: THORChain exploit tied to malicious node and GG20 flaw
item.description: The $10.7 million THORChain exploit was caused by a GG20 vulnerability, which allowed a malicious node to reconstruct a full private key to one of its vaults.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: XRP adds 4,300 new wallets in 24 hours, but why is price stuck?
item.description: XRP Ledger activity surges with 4,300 new wallets created in 24 hours, but strong resistance keeps XRP price capped.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Polymarket seeks Japan entry despite gambling law hurdles: Report
item.description: Polymarket is reportedly seeking entry into Japan amid falling trading volumes and rising regulatory scrutiny, targeting approval by 2030.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Polymarket team says user funds safe as exploit losses climb above $600K
item.description: Polymarket said user funds and market resolution were safe after a suspected private key compromise tied to top-up operations.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Verus bridge exploiter returns $8.5M after bounty offer
item.description: The hacker behind the Verus bridge exploit returned 75% of the stolen funds as part of a recovery deal negotiated with the protocol days after the incident.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin price record 90-day uptrend 'resembles bull market rally:' New analysis
item.description: Bitcoin rallied for 90 days after its dip below $60,000, breaking the record for the longest uptrend within a bear market in BTC price history.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Hamilton ETFs files for leveraged Bitcoin income ETF in Canada
item.description: The proposed fund would use covered-call and short-term options strategies designed to generate monthly income alongside Bitcoin exposure through a leveraged structure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: UAE-backed DDSC stablecoin processes $30M institutional transaction
item.description: The transfer was executed on ADI Chain, a layer-2 blockchain designed for institutional payments, treasury operations and trade settlement.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Tokenized stocks risk liquidity and revenue fragmentation: Research
item.description: TradFi views the breakup of its previously consolidated, centralized liquidity as a “serious structural threat,” said Tiger Research director Ryan Yoon.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Galaxy’s Novogratz speaks in court over failed $1.2B BitGo deal: Report
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Mike Novogratz reportedly told a court the SEC made it “very difficult” to complete a planned 2021 merger with BitGo.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: SEC's Peirce tempers expectations over tokenized stocks exemption
item.description: An executive at tokenization platforms Superstate said the stricter approach suggested by Hester Peirce would enable DeFi to expand without compromising rules in traditional capital markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Coinbase premium hits monthly low as institutional selling pressure mounts
item.description: Uncertainty surrounding the current macro environment “appears to be pushing institutions toward hedging strategies while waiting for greater clarity,” said analyst Darkfost.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Accused attackers of Sandbox exec’s wife tried to flee via Uber
item.description: CertiK reported earlier this month that criminal wrench attack teams usually consist of three to five people and are often made up of amateurs, while the masterminds are outside the country.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: US lawmakers renew strategic Bitcoin reserve push with ARMA bill
item.description: Under the American Reserve Modernization Act of 2026, Bitcoin must be held for a minimum of 20 years unless used to slash national debt.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: 5 crypto firms wind down this week amid ongoing market slump
item.description: Fantasy.top, Everclear and ZERO Network announced they were winding down on Thursday, adding to a growing list of crypto companies that have closed this year.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Bitcoin liquidity balance hints at developing rally toward $80K
item.description: Data show Bitcoin futures traders are pursuing overhead short positions, raising the chance of a rally to $80,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Bitcoin longs soar despite weak US macroeconomic data: Is $82K BTC next?
item.description: Data shows Bitcoin traders cutting short positions and going long despite concerning US macroeconomic data emerging. Is a rally toward $82,000 next?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman
